text.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; fill: rgb(34, 36, 42);
text.tspan: -> 8.7 -> 10.2 -> 8.4.1, chained so recurring NCRs auto-affect the supplier score. Receiving inspection (8.6, COA hard block) detects nonconforming -> raise NCR (8.7: item, delivery-note#, date, description, %non-conformance, image; raised by QC/FM/requester; goods segregated) -> disposition {

-> handler resolves with supplier via SCAR -> supplier root-cause + corrective action (10.2) -> effectiveness review (not-effective re-opens the SCAR) -> feeds supplier scorecard re-evaluation (8.4.1) -> suspend gate: critical NCR / two consecutive periods below target / failed audit / expired cer
t / sanctions / active CAPA -> SUSPENDED (blocks new POs), else continue monitoring. Suspend is split: Quality on a quality stop, Tax/Compliance on sanctions, Admin always.
